stories.title: Fix RPC security hole — SELECT leaks other users' conversation metadata
acceptance: Add WHERE c.user_id = p_user_id to the SELECT in ensure_copilot_conversation RPC
Add org membership check: if p_org_id is provided, verify auth.uid() is member of that org
Return empty result (not error) if conversation exists but belongs to another user
Deploy updated migration to staging

stories.title: Fix dual message store — history click shows blank chat in autonomous mode
acceptance: loadConversation() in CopilotContext injects loaded messages into autonomousCopilot when autonomousModeEnabled
Remove duplicate message loading — either CopilotContext OR useCopilotChat loads messages, not both
Single source of truth for conversationId: CopilotContext owns it, useCopilotChat reads from options only
Verify: click conversation in history → messages appear in chat area (not blank)

stories.title: Fix ensureConversation declaration order crash + startNewChat return type
acceptance: Move ensureConversation definition BEFORE startNewChat in CopilotContext.tsx
startNewChat always returns string (UUID) — update return type, remove void possibility
Remove uuidv4() fallback in CopilotPage.tsx since startNewChat always returns an ID
Verify: navigating to /copilot (no ID) correctly creates new conversation without crash

stories.title: Fix seeded prompt race condition — remove setTimeout hack
acceptance: Replace setTimeout(100) with proper async chain: await ensureConversation → await state update → sendMessage
Move navigate() inside the .then() callback AFTER sendMessage is called
Seeded prompt flow verified: message persisted to correct conversation, not stale ID
Clear location.state after processing to prevent re-send on back navigation

stories.title: Fix title auto-generation using wrong conversationId source
acceptance: Title generation uses autonomousCopilot.conversationId when autonomousModeEnabled (not state.conversationId)
Title is set after message is confirmed persisted (not before)
Verify: send first message → conversation title updates in History section

stories.title: Fix ConnectedSection navigation — use React Router instead of window.location
acceptance: ConnectedSection uses useNavigate() instead of window.location.href
handleAddConnector and handleIntegrationClick use navigate()
Conversation state preserved when navigating to integration settings
Back navigation returns to copilot with chat intact

stories.title: Fix conversation deletion — handle session summaries FK + delete confirmation UI
acceptance: useDeleteConversation deletes copilot_session_summaries before messages (if table exists)
Replace window.confirm() with styled AlertDialog component
Track which conversation is being deleted — only disable that delete button, not all
Verify: delete works even for conversations that have been compacted

stories.title: Fix sendMessage dependency array + message persistence ordering
acceptance: Remove conversationId from sendMessage useCallback dependency array (ref is used for value)
Add explicit created_at timestamp when inserting messages via addMessage to guarantee ordering
Verify: rapid message sending preserves correct chronological order in DB

stories.title: Fix integration status hook — remove as any, add error handling, fix logo fallback
acceptance: Remove 'as any' cast — use typed supabase queries or proper type assertions
Check r.error on each integration query — log warning before falling back to false
IntegrationLogo component tracks load errors via React state and renders FallbackIcon on error
Verify: broken logo URL shows Link2 icon, not empty square

stories.title: Make Context and Connected sections collapsible for consistency
acceptance: Context section uses CollapsibleSection (defaultOpen=true) instead of custom non-interactive button
Connected section uses CollapsibleSection (defaultOpen=true)
All 5 sections have consistent collapse/expand behavior
Remove the onClick={() => {}} and pointerEvents: 'none' from Context header

stories.title: Optimize conversation history with RPC for counts + previews
acceptance: Create RPC get_conversation_summaries(p_user_id, p_limit) that returns conversations with message_count and first_user_message in a single query
Replace two-query pattern in useConversationHistory with single RPC call
Bandwidth reduced >95% for users with many conversations
Deploy RPC to staging

stories.title: Performance — memoize getActiveMessages + debounce message scanning effects
acceptance: getActiveMessages() wrapped in useMemo with appropriate deps
Three message-scanning effects (structured response, tool calls, HITL) use lastProcessedIndex ref to avoid rescanning
Context merging logic in Copilot.tsx wrapped in useMemo
Verify: streaming responses don't cause jank

stories.title: Clean up dead code — getMainSession, email modal, compaction, agent mode
acceptance: Remove getMainSession() from copilotSessionService.ts (dead after refactor)
Remove deprecated onGenerateEmail/onDraftEmail props and emailModal state from Copilot.tsx
Remove ENTITY_ICONS emoji constants from RichCopilotInput.tsx
Add TODO comment on compaction methods noting they need an automated trigger
Audit agent mode reachability — remove if no UI entry point exists

stories.title: Design polish — active highlight colors, light mode contrast, badge sizing
acceptance: ConversationHistory active highlight uses consistent violet color in both compact and non-compact modes
CopilotEmpty icon container uses bg-gray-100 dark:bg-white/[0.08] for light mode contrast
Fix w-4.5 h-4.5 to use valid Tailwind class (w-[18px] h-[18px] or w-5 h-5)
ExecutionTelemetry badge uses standard sizing
